references.original_citation: J. D'Ambrosia, "IEEE P802.3bs Baseline Summary," IEEE P802.3bs 400GbE Task Force (2015).
references.title: IEEE P802.3bs Baseline Summary
references.abstract: 400GbE (400 Gb/s 以太网) 标准的基线总结，采用PAM4技术，代表了下一代移动网络的转型时刻。

references.original_citation: A. Ghiasi, "400GBase-LR8: A proposal for 10 km objective Using 50 Gb/s PAM4 Signaling," IEEE P802.3bs 400GbE Task Force (2015).
references.title: 400GBase-LR8: A proposal for 10 km objective Using 50 Gb/s PAM4 Signaling
references.abstract: 400GBASE-LR8是400G以太网的一种光模块标准，采用8个并行传输通道，每通道50 Gb/s传输速率，总传输速率400 Gbps，单模光纤传输距离可达10公里，采用PAM4调制技术。
